plugins.name: loopgen
plugins.description: Turn any task description into a ready-to-paste six-part agentic loop prompt. /loopgen <your task>.

plugins.name: roast
plugins.description: Convene an adversarial council to pressure-test an idea before you commit — five rival personas plus a Judge that returns GREEN LIGHT / RESHAPE / KILL and the cheapest 48-hour test.

plugins.name: flip-check
plugins.description: Should you buy this secondhand item to resell? Runs the sourcing gates and returns BUY or WALK with a max price. Includes an eBay comps script.
